name: glazed-ceramic__brushed-anodized__0002

inputs.surfaceDetail: Glazed Ceramic, Fine grain, realistic specular highlights, no heavy scratches, 동양식 투각 스타일 도자기 스타일의 문양을 만들어줘
inputs.lighting: Top-left key light + soft 3-point studio lighting, minimize shadows

promptKo:
목표: 공중에 단 하나의 구(스피어)만 중앙에 떠 있는 재질 샘플 이미지.
재질(Material): Glazed Ceramic
색(Color): Neutral White
마감(Finish): Brushed + Anodized
표면 디테일(Texture/Detail): Glazed Ceramic, Fine grain, realistic specular highlights, no heavy scratches, 동양식 투각 스타일 도자기 스타일의 문양을 만들어줘
조명(Lighting): Top-left key light + soft 3-point studio lighting, minimize shadows
환경: 순백(#FFFFFF) 배경, 바닥/접촉 그림자 없음, 다른 오브젝트 없음.
금지: 텍스트/로고/라벨/워터마크/설명 문구.
promptEn: A single sphere floating centrally in midair, material: glazed ceramic, color: neutral white, finish: brushed and anodized, surface detail: glazed ceramic with fine grain, realistic specular highlights, no heavy scratches, featuring East Asian pierced-style ceramic patterns. Lighting: top-left key light with soft 3-point studio lighting, minimizing shadows. Environment: pure white (#FFFFFF) background, no floor or contact shadows, no other objects. No text, logos, labels, or watermarks.
promptCmf: A photorealistic 3D sphere isolated on a pure white background. The sphere features glazed ceramic material with a neutral white color and a brushed anodized finish. Surface detail: glazed ceramic with fine grain and East Asian pierced-style ceramic patterns, realistic specular highlights, no heavy scratches. Lighting: top-left key light with soft 3-point studio lighting, minimizing shadows. No floor/contact shadows; the sphere appears floating in a void. Centered composition, clean neutral studio look, realistic PBR material response, crisp but soft edge highlights, no depth-of-field gimmicks. No text, no logos, no labels, no watermark, no extra objects, exactly one sphere.
